snippet.title: Mastodon - Snakes For Dinner (Official Video)
snippet.description:
You have all been asking for it, so we are excited to announce our new album, Marrow Deep, will be released August 28th, 2026 and we are kicking it off with a new video for our new song “Snakes For Dinner”, which features an appearance from our long time friend, Josh Homme.

It’s been quite the journey making this album, and we are very happy with how it came out, we can not wait for you to hear the whole thing! Until then, check out the new video, and pre-order a copy of the album today. Stay tuned, we’l keep bringing you updates, content and bunch of other cool fun stuff!

As always, thank you for being part of our world. We look forward to seeing you all on the Poisonous Weapons Tour and beyond!

Pre-order: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/shop
Pre-save: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/marrowdeep
Stream: http://i.mastodonrocks.com/snakesfordinner

Directed by DEATHCATS

Lyrics:
Snakes For Dinner
What’s left to say
Thought I’ve seen it all
Broke our circle
Hitting us too hard
Innocence
Shattered light
Coming in
Hearts alive

When you left you took the moon and stars
Buried them deep underneath the ocean
When you left you took our hearts and minds
All that I could find amongst the grime were memories

Fault and reason
Make my head spin
Welcome failure
To become my friend

Where am I in the lense of your eyes

snippet.title: TennoCon 2026 | Warframe: Tau | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Prepare to step beyond the Origin System and enter Tau in 2026. 

Once a paradise built by the Sentients, Tau has been lost to war and ruin. Nowhere is this felt more keenly than on the black rain-soaked streets of Fornax, a colossal Sentient ring city. Here, the devastating downpour and its maddening influence run in rivulets from the heights of the Hunra's gambling dens, through the Docks, and into the most desperate Slums — where the residents have turned to the mind-altering Bloom in search of escape.

There, Albrecht Entrati awaits the arrival of the Tenno after conscripting the inner monologuing and noir-inspired Warframe, Brysko, to infiltrate the Hunra's criminal underworld — a final gamble to avert Fornax falling to those with nothing to lose.

Get ready to risk it all. Warframe: Tau arrives later this year. 

►► WHAT IS WARFRAME? 

Join 90M+ registered players in Warframe, a cooperative, free-to-play third-person looter shooter set in a constantly evolving sci-fi universe. For more info, visit https://warframe.com.

snippet.description:

🎶 Alphaville
https://www.facebook.com/alphavilleofficial/
https://www.instagram.com/alphaville.music

🎧 [LYRICS]: Alphaville - Forever Young

[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?

[Verse 2]
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad men

[Verse 3]
Can you imagine when this race is won
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 4]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?

[Verse 5]
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Verse 6]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

snippet.title: Bonnie Tyler - Holding Out For A Hero (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | Bonnie Tyler
💿 Canción | Holding Out For A Hero
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 27/01/1984
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop, Rock

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"Holding Out for a Hero" de Bonnie Tyler es uno de los himnos más icónicos de los años 80. Lanzada en 1984, la canción expresa el deseo de encontrar a un héroe fuerte, valiente y extraordinario en los momentos más difíciles. Tras el reciente fallecimiento de Bonnie Tyler, este clásico cobra un significado aún más especial, recordando el legado de una de las voces más inconfundibles de la música.

📲 Sígue a "Bonnie Tyler" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYPymLmMIXZEbPGZCep2P9A

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Intro]
Do-do, do-do
Do-do, do-do
Do-do, do-do
Ah, ah

[Verse 1]
Where have all the good men gone and where are all the gods?
Where's the streetwise Hercules to fight the risin' odds?
Isn't there a white knight upon a fiery steed? (Ooh-ooh-ooh)
Late at night, I toss and I turn and I dream of what I need (Ah-ah)

[Chorus]
I need a hero
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night
He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the morning light (Hero till the morning light)
He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
And he's gotta be larger than life, larger than life

[Post-Chorus]
Do-do, do-do
Do-do, do-do
Do-do, do-do
Ah, ah

[Verse 2]
Somewhere after midnight in my wildest fantasy
Somewhere just beyond my reach, there's someone reaching back for me
(Ooh) Racing on the thunder and rising with the heat (Ooh-ooh-ooh)
It's gonna take a Superman to sweep me off my feet, yeah (Ah-ah)

[Chorus]
I need a hero
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night
He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the morning light (Hero till the morning light)
He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
And he's gotta be larger than life
I need a hero
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night

[Bridge]
Up where the mountains meet the heavens above
Out where the lightning splits the sea
I could swear there is someone somewhere watchin' me
Through the wind and the chill and the rain
And the storm and the flood
I can feel his approach like a fire in my blood
(Like a fire in my blood, like a fire in my blood) (Ah)
(Like a fire in my blood, like a fire in my blood, blood) (Ah)

[Chorus]
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night
He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast (Ah)
And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the morning light (Hero till the morning light)
He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
And he's gotta be larger than life
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night
He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
I need a hero (Hero)
I'm holding out for a hero till the morning light (Hero till the morning light)
He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
And he's gotta be larger than life
I need a hero
I'm holding out for a hero till the end of the night

snippet.title: 100% BONNES NOUVELLES GAMING 🥰 Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, Banjo-Kazooie & co...
snippet.description:
Après des semaines d’actualité gaming parfois lourde, inquiétante, voire franchement déprimante, aujourd'hui j’ai eu envie de faire exactement l’inverse : ne vous parler que de bonnes nouvelles !

Et oui, il y en a ! Entre Assassin’s Creed qui semble retrouver une belle dynamique, Banjo-Kazooie qui fait à nouveau parler de lui, Star Ocean qui pourrait bien réveiller de très bons souvenirs chez les amateurs de J-RPG, ou encore Project Awakening, ce mystérieux jeu que beaucoup pensaient presque disparu… l’actualité nous réserve aussi de jolies éclaircies.

Dans cette vidéo, on prend donc le temps de regarder ce qui va bien, ce qui donne envie, ce qui réveille la passion et ce qui rappelle pourquoi on aime autant le jeu vidéo.

Parce que parfois, au milieu des polémiques, des fermetures de studios et des mauvaises nouvelles, ça fait du bien de se dire que le jeu vidéo peut encore surprendre, enthousiasmer et faire sourire. Je vous en parle.
